MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven A. MacDonald, Esq., 956-6488, appearing for plaintiff/moving party Walter Parker
Paul McCarthy, Esq., 510/836-0100, appearing for defendant/opposing party Darlene Fitzgerald

RULING:
Upon agreement of parties, the Court continued PLAINTIFFS WALTER PARKER, DANNY PARKER'S Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorney's Fees Awardable As An Item Of Costs To Prevailing Party On Contract to January 11, 2006 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 301. Defendant is allowed to file additional brief as requested. (301/AJR/CK) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620

Motion To Tax And Strike Costs
Off Calendar Dec-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul McCarthy, Esq., 510/836-0100, appearing for defendant/opposing party Darlene Fitzgerald
Steven A. MacDonald, Esq., 956-6488, appearing for plaintiff/moving party Walter Parker

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled as follows -- DEFENDANT DARLENE FITZGERALD'S Motion To Tax And Strike Costs - granted as to $18 transcript fee, $558.57 other fees and attorney fees "per noticed motion"; denied as to service fees $1,226.6 and remaining items.
